summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of redesigned Xanadu Stays homepage. All 17 specified features working perfectly including hero carousel, search functionality, property cards, booking modal, WhatsApp integration, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with proper title and branding
Hero carousel auto-advances every 5 seconds with 3 slides
Location badge 'Kolkata, India' displays correctly
Search form with date pickers and guest selector fully functional
All 4 trust badges displayed (Verified Host, ID Verified, Professional Cleaning, 24/7 Support)
4 property cards with exact pricing (₹2,500, ₹2,200, ₹2,000, ₹1,800)
Availability badges on all property cards (Guest Favorite, Available, Limited Availability)
Property ratings and review counts displayed correctly
Live viewer indicator shows '2 people viewing now' on featured property
About Host section with Sona's profile, bio, and 4 stats (200+, 98%, <1hr, 3 yrs)
Reviews section with overall 4.86 rating and 3 testimonials
Policy cards display correctly (Free Cancellation, Secure Booking, Transparent Pricing, 24/7 Support)
WhatsApp sidebar visible and functional on desktop
Sticky mobile CTA bar visible on mobile (375px width)
Book Now button opens inquiry modal with all form fields
Inquiry form submits successfully to WhatsApp with formatted message
Siddha SkyView Studio navigation to detail page works correctly
External property links (Xanadu 922, 313, 310) open Airbnb in new tabs
Search functionality redirects to property details page
Mobile responsiveness perfect at 375px width
Desktop WhatsApp sidebar hidden on mobile, mobile CTA shown
All form elements accessible and functional on both desktop and mobile
No console errors or JavaScript issues detected
